global_image_policy.style_direction: Bright editorial product photography with minimal abstract overlays
brand_constraints: Use the market-slate palette as color inspiration only.

prompts.purpose: Cover image for a deck about presentation quality control.
prompts.positive_prompt: A clean studio scene showing presentation boards, color swatches, and a laptop with abstract dashboard shapes, bright editorial lighting, premium product photography, no visible brand marks.
prompts.negative_prompt: No real people, no readable brand logos, no private documents, no cluttered office background.
prompts.reference_notes: Use as a full-bleed cover visual with enough quiet space for headline text.

zh-CN.purpose: 为演示质量控制主题创建封面图像。
zh-CN.positive_prompt: 一个干净的工作室场景，展示演示板、色卡和一台带抽象仪表盘形状的笔记本电脑，明亮编辑光线，高级产品摄影感，不出现可识别品牌标识。
zh-CN.negative_prompt: 不要真实人物，不要可读品牌 logo，不要私人文件，不要杂乱办公室背景。
zh-CN.reference_notes: 作为全幅封面视觉使用，保留足够安静空间放置标题文字。

en.purpose: Cover image for a deck about presentation quality control.
en.positive_prompt: A clean studio scene showing presentation boards, color swatches, and a laptop with abstract dashboard shapes, bright editorial lighting, premium product photography, no visible brand marks.
en.negative_prompt: No real people, no readable brand logos, no private documents, no cluttered office background.
en.reference_notes: Use as a full-bleed cover visual with enough quiet space for headline text.
